flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Crown College are 21% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($48.1k vs $60.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Crown College fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (60.7% → 45.4%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Crown College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (50.7% → 40.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Crown College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.1k → $31.4k).
